diagrams.title: Paper Prototype Development Process
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing iterative process from requirements to validated design
diagrams.purpose: Shows the cyclical nature of paper prototyping and when to transition to digital

diagrams.title: Fidelity Spectrum
diagrams.description: Visual representation showing low-fidelity to high-fidelity progression
diagrams.purpose: Helps understand where paper prototypes fit in the design fidelity spectrum

diagrams.title: Wizard of Oz Testing Setup
diagrams.description: Diagram showing the testing setup with user, paper prototype, and wizard
diagrams.purpose: Illustrates how human intervention simulates system behavior during testing

diagrams.title: Horizontal vs Vertical Prototyping
diagrams.purpose: Clarifies the difference between breadth-first and depth-first prototyping approaches
